headline: Republic Services AI Recycling Investment And Valuation Gap Draw Investor Focus
summary: Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) has opened an upgraded Peabody Recycling Center with advanced automated and AI-powered sorting technology. The facility adds expanded processing capacity and new safety features to support local recycling and waste reduction goals. The investment reflects a larger focus on recycling infrastructure within the US waste and environmental services sector. For investors watching NYSE:RSG, the Peabody upgrade highlights how the company is putting capital into...
